markets.description:
In the upcoming Liga MX game, scheduled for April 3 at 11:06 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Club Tijuana" if Club Tijuana win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Tigres de la UANL".

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligamx.net. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers.
